script:
set +e
echo '=== mskai err log (last 60 lines) ==='
grep -E 'claude (rc|timeout|spawn|rate-limited)|empty reply|first attempt failed' /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -60
echo '=== aixa err log (sample sibling) ==='
grep -E 'claude (rc|timeout|spawn|rate-limited)|empty reply|first attempt failed' /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20
echo '=== mskai debug log claude rc samples ==='
tail -200 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/debug.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'RC:|usage limit|claude rate' | tail -20
echo '=== try claude binary directly with trivial prompt ==='
timeout 60 sudo -u azureuser bash -lc 'echo hi | claude -p --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' 2>&1 | head -30
echo '===END==='
